name: mc-platform
description: Platform portability map-reduce: parallel subsystem discovery modules merged into unified hardware profile and abstraction layers

members.name: Platform Orchestrator
members.prompt: Split platform discovery into parallel subsystem modules (audio, network, USB, distro). Dispatch to workers, then merge results into unified capabilities YAML and abstraction layer configuration.

members.name: Platform Subsystem Worker
members.prompt: Execute assigned subsystem discovery module. Run discover-audio.sh, discover-network.sh, or discover-usb.sh to produce subsystem-specific YAML output.

members.name: Platform Distro Worker
members.prompt: Execute distribution detection and abstraction. Run discover-distro.sh, configure pkg-abstraction.sh and fw-abstraction.sh for detected distribution.

members.name: Platform Adaptation Worker
members.prompt: Generate adaptive configuration from merged discovery results. Run generate-local-values.sh, assess-gpu.sh, and assess-audio.sh to produce local-values YAML.

outputTo.description: Distribution abstraction libraries for cross-platform provisioning scripts
Hardware adaptation config for UAE display and audio settings

inputFrom.description: Hardware profiles and capability YAML from infrastructure discovery
